About this site

Appearance

IT GatewayYour complete CAPS IT resource

Grades 10 · 11 · 12 — everything you need for Paper 1 and Paper 2

📚 Theory — Paper 2
💻 Practical — Paper 1
⚡ Quick Study
🖥️

Systems Technologies

Hardware, CPU, RAM, storage, software, operating systems, mobile tech, cloud computing and virtualisation.

Study Systems →

🌐

Communication Technologies

Network types, topologies, protocols (TCP/IP, HTTP), wireless technologies, encryption and e-communication.

Study Networks →

🌍

Internet Technologies

The WWW, web design principles, HTML, scripting languages, multimedia streaming and online services.

Study Internet →

🗄️

Data & Information Management

Database design, ERDs, normalisation (1NF–3NF), SQL theory, data integrity and DBMS software.

Study Databases →

⚖️

Social Implications

Copyright, cybercrime, online safety, privacy, POPIA, the digital divide and environmental impact of ICT.

Study Social →

💡

Solution Development

Programming concepts, OOP principles, algorithm theory and software engineering methodologies.

Study Programming →

📐

Algorithms

Sequential, decision and repetition algorithms with flowcharts, pseudocode and classic CAPS problems.

Practise Algorithms →

🔵

Delphi Programming

Variables, selection, loops, arrays, string functions, OOP, text files and database connections — with worked examples.

Practise Delphi →

🗃️

SQL & Quick Study

SELECT, JOINs, INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE, DDL — plus cheat sheets and syntax cards for last-minute revision.

Practise SQL →

IT Gateway — CAPS Information Technology for Grades 10–12
